# Finsweet

> Finsweet is a web development agency website showcasing services, company information, career opportunities, and blog content. Built with React, TypeScript, Vite, and Tailwind CSS.

## Services

- [Technical Support](https://finsweet1.netlify.app/services): Expert technical support solutions for your business
- [Development](https://finsweet1.netlify.app/services): Custom web development services
- [Testing Management](https://finsweet1.netlify.app/services): Quality assurance and testing services

## Company

- [Our Story](https://finsweet1.netlify.app/company): Learn about Finsweet's journey from startup to industry leader
- [Team](https://finsweet1.netlify.app/company): Meet our team of skilled professionals
- [Vision](https://finsweet1.netlify.app/company): Our vision for global digital transformation

## Blog

- [All Posts](https://finsweet1.netlify.app/blog): Latest articles and insights
- [Trending Posts](https://finsweet1.netlify.app/blog): Popular content from our blog

## Career

- [Open Positions](https://finsweet1.netlify.app/career): Join our team of professionals
- [Culture](https://finsweet1.netlify.app/career): Our work culture and values

## Contact

- [Contact Us](https://finsweet1.netlify.app/contact): Get in touch with our team
